INSTRUCTIONS

WASD move  ·  MOUSE look  ·  L-CLICK fire  ·  R-CLICK aim  ·  SHIFT sprint  ·  SPACE jump  ·  CTRL crouch  ·  SPRINT+C slide
R reload  ·  V melee (auto when dry)  ·  G throw grenade  ·  E use station / open cache  ·  1·2·3 / scroll weapons
ESC pause  ·  P open the in-game model/transform editor
Kill enemies for ◆ credits — spend them at the ammo station and supply caches.
Controller connected — L-stick move · R-stick look · RT fire · LT aim · A jump · X reload · Y use · B grenade · LB/RB weapons · L3 sprint · any button deploys   (press ` for controller test)
Left stick move · push to the edge to sprint
Drag the right side to look · FIRE to shoot (drag while firing to aim)
AIM toggle zoom · JUMP · reload · grenade · swap weapon · USE station / cache
Tap the minimap to open the full map · pause with the ❚❚ button
Kill enemies for credits — spend them at the ammo station and supply caches.
Tip: pause → ✿ Customize controls to move or resize any on-screen button.

CREDITS & ATTRIBUTION

MULTIPLAYER

→ JOIN A ROOM
Got a code from the host? Drop in to their game.
Open games
CO-OP
Team up and clear waves together. You host — friends join with your room code.
1 v 1 DUEL
Head-to-head arena fight — first to the kill target wins.
first tokills
FREE-FOR-ALL
Everyone vs everyone (3+ players). Most kills to the target wins. Share your code with the whole group.
first tokills
TEAM DEATHMATCH
Auto-balanced Red vs Blue, no friendly fire. First team to the kill target wins. Players are assigned as they join.
